body.title: Cognition health metrics — NE rate, LTM count, arousal gate to infra.metrics
body.result: record_metric() added to Cortex; cognition.ne_cycle_result/ltm_surfaced_count/arousal_gate_suppression written from coa.py and push_sources.py
body.description:
Write three cognition health metrics to infra.metrics so signal/noise ratio is observable via SQL. The table exists (created in cortex.py) but has no write helper. Metric points: (1) cognition.ne_cycle_result (1.0=success, 0.0=empty) in coa.py after each NE evaluation; (2) cognition.ltm_surfaced_count (N memories pushed) in MemorySurfacer.push() after the push loop; (3) cognition.arousal_gate_suppression (arousal value) in MemorySurfacer.push() when milieu_scale() returns a reduced salience (salience_in != salience_out and arousal > 0.3). Pattern: add cortex.record_metric(name, value, tags=None) helper that INSERTs to infra.metrics, then call it from the three sites. Observable via: SELECT metric_name, AVG(metric_value), COUNT(*) FROM infra.metrics WHERE metric_name LIKE 'cognition.%' AND recorded_at > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY metric_name;

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/memory/cortex.py (add record_metric() method), wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py (NE result write ~line 237 empty-result branch + success branch), wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (MemorySurfacer.push() ~line 199, after milieu_scale call and after push loop)
**Design rules:** OOP-first (record_metric on Cortex, not standalone); no-sqlite (infra.metrics is Postgres)
**Scope boundary:** IN: record_metric() helper on Cortex; three metric write points listed above. OUT: TTL/purge for infra.metrics (accumulates — acceptable for now, low-volume); instrumenting other push sources; dashboards or alerting. cortex.record_metric() may also be called from other sites in future but this ticket adds the helper only.
**Test plan:** After Igor restart, let one NE cycle complete. Query: SELECT metric_name, metric_value, recorded_at FROM infra.metrics WHERE metric_name LIKE 'cognition.%' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 10; — should see at least cognition.ne_cycle_result row within 1 cycle. No unit test (cognition loop integration only; DB writes hit real Postgres per theigors/rules/database).
